pages.text:
MINISTER OF FOREIGN AFFAIRS AND COMMONWEALTH RELATIONS

Tele h ne 26900

P.M.B. No. 2620

Rference.

Lagos, Nigeria 23 November, 196 2.

INSTRUMENT OF ACCESSIOT

The Governor-General of the Federation of Nigeria, having seen and examined (a)

the Convention regarding international exhibitions, signed at Paris, November 22, 1928, and (b)

the Protocol modifying the Convention signed at Paris on

22. November 1928 regarding international exhibitions signed at Paris, May 10, 1948,

Having resolved to accede to the said Convention and Protocol on behalf of the Federation of Nigerla,

Has authorised thereto Mr. JAJA ANUCHA WACHUKU, Minister of

Foreign Affairs and Commonwealth Relations of the Federation of

Nigeria,

Who, in virtue to the authorisation, declares

That the Federation of Nigeria accedes to the said Convention

The present declaration being the instrument of accession meant in article 35, under (b), of the Convention, and in article III of the Protocol.

Signed and sealed at Lagos, the 23d November, 1962.

Austen (JAJA

ANUCHA WACHUKU)

MINISTER OF FOREIGN AFFAIRS AND

COMMONWEALTH RELATIONS

OF THE

FEDERATION OF NIGERIA.
